message:
feat(ft-optim): implement AdamW optimizer with decoupled weight decay

Full AdamW implementation following Loshchilov & Hutter (2019) with
decoupled weight decay that is applied directly to parameters before
the Adam update step, rather than through L2 regularization of the loss.

Features:
- Builder pattern for configuring betas (default 0.9/0.999),
  epsilon (default 1e-8), and weight_decay (default 0.01)
- Maintains per-parameter first and second moment estimates
- Bias correction for moment estimates

Test suite:
- Comparison with Adam L2 to verify the update trajectories differ
  (validates decoupled vs coupled weight decay)
- Multi-step convergence test
- Zero-gradient test (only weight decay applied)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
